1.content:
Brian was at the last football game of his senior year of high school and had just turned eighteen the previous week. He didn’t play football and could care less about the sport, but loved to sit in the stands and ogle the cheerleaders, specifically Samantha. He fantasized about her constantly, getting lost in her blue pools for eyes as well as her long wavy brown hair. As she jumped up and down, he caught himself following her C cup breasts as they bounced with every jump.

“Oh if only I could get inside that tiny little skirt of her’s”, Brian thought as she suddenly gave him the stink eye.

“Oops”, he thought as he was caught watching her. Suddenly Brian shrieked as he felt a rush of cold liquid pour on top of his head and down the back of his shirt. He slowly looked back and saw Tyler, one of the linebackers cracking a smirk before he shoved him into the bleacher seat.

“Who do you think you’re looking at? Samantha already has a pussy, she don’t need you”, Tyler was greeted to hand claps by the rest of his team before being scolded by the coach for leaving the side-lines. The cheerleaders cupped their mouths and giggled, pointing at Brian as he slowly stood up, soaked in whatever sports drink Tyler was drinking.

“Fuck all of you!”, Brian exclaimed as he stomped off the field.

Later that night, as Brian was lying in bed he heard a tapping on his window.

“What the hell?”, he thought

He rose out of bed and opened the blinds to see a strange flying creature waving at him from the other side. He couldn’t believe his eyes. This beautiful creature resembled a scantily clad woman with dark hair and green eyes like glass. The creature cracked a grin at the jaw dropped Brian and pointed at the bottom of the window. Brian shook his head and snapped out of it, opening the window for the creature.

“Who and what are you? You can’t be a fairy… can you?” Brain said as the creature flew in, in a giggle.

“Indeed hun, you learn quickly”, she giggled in a tiny voice.

“I must have fallen asleep, this is a dream”, Brian said to himself.

“You aren’t dreaming mister, I’m here on official business,” the fairy stated as she crossed her arms.

“Okay, assuming I’m not dreaming and you really are here, who are you and what do you want from me?”, Brian inquired as he was clearly flustered with this encounter.

“My name is Celeste and I’m a dark fairy,” she said with a smirk.

“A dark fairy?”, Brian questioned.

“Oh yes”, Celeste said biting her lip.

“I thought fairies didn’t exist...how…” Brian was cutoff as Celeste flew toward him and put a finger over his lips.

“Too many questions, silly, I don’t have time for all that. I came here to grant you a wish,” Celeste smirked.

“A... wish?” Brian asked nervously.

“Yep, I couldn’t but notice you getting lost in your fantasies over that cute cheerleader. I was saddened by it. I know it must be tough to have such feelings for someone and not have them returned,” Celeste playfully pouted.

“You… you can do that? You can make her like me?” Brian perked up.

“In a matter of speaking. Let’s just say I can make the two of you inseparable if you wish me to”, Celeste giggled.

“Oh god yes, you have no idea what that would mean to me”, Brian stated.

“Well is that your wish then, for you and Samantha to be together?” Celeste’s right index finger began to glow.

“Yes! Yes! Please!,” Brian exclaimed with joy.

“Hold tight then,” Celeste said with a devilish grin as a blinding light filled the room.

Suddenly Brian was in a dark place and could hardly move. His whole body seemed to be wrapped in some type of silky fabric. He tried to stretch out against the fabric when he noticed his limbs felt strange. He tried to ask where he was when he noticed his voice was suddenly gone. Panicking he fought against the fabric, desperately trying to get free when he noticed that suddenly his nose started to get hot and became super sensitive the more he moved.

Instinctively he reached up to touch his nose when a strange yet extremely powerful jolt of pleasure soured through his entire body.

“Wow...what the fuck was that?” Brian thought as he began to rub some more only to be startled once more as the silky fabric was suddenly removed from his body.

Samantha awoke and shot up as she suddenly felt strange movement in her panties. It felt as if someone was massaging her lady lips except she felt no fingers and no one else was there. She yelped and turned on the lamp on her night stand as she felt her labia lightly graze her clit.

“What the hell!?” She yelped as the touching continued and yanked her panties down only to find nothing there.

“What the hell was that? I must be going out of my mind,” she said.

Brian was frightened at the sudden light in his face and froze as he saw a giant Samantha looking down upon him. As he looked down Samantha’s toned legs a feeling of dread came over him as he realized the nature of the wish granted to him. Celeste made them inseparable, but did not specify how. Brian became Samatha’s vagina.
1.title: Brian the Perv

11.content:

“There, sorry I always forget this part. You should be able to talk now.”, Celeste giggled.

Brian hummed a little and sure enough he now has a voice box.

“What the fuck fairy? You know this isn’t what I meant,” Brian angrily whispered.

“Sounds like someone isn’t happy with their wish. Sorry no take backs hun what’s done is done,” Celeste said with a sinister grin.

“You’ve got to be shitting me. I’m stuck like this? Do you realize how cramped this feels? I have a pussy for a mouth and nothing else. Not to mention the fact that I could possibly have someone’s dick inside my pussy mouth anytime,” Brian said getting more and more flustered.

“Wow, that;s intense, yet the most incredible thing I’ve ever felt. I almost don’t want to stop.” Brian said.

“I should say not, that is a clit after all,” Celeste blushed.

“Wait… my nose is a clit?”, Brian inquired.

“Technically you don’t have a nose, but I guess from your perspective I could see where it would feel that way.” Celeste said.

“I guess that makes sense. What if she finds out? Do I have to keep it a secret?”, Brain asked.

“Honey that is up to you, although I can’t see you keeping it a secret for very long honestly. Do you really think you could stay that still?”, she asked rhetorically.

Brian sighed, thinking about what to do.

“Look, you’re worrying too much. You are now the most sensitive part of the body of your crush. A girl that knew you liked her and treated you like shit for it, all because you weren’t popular. She laughed at you as that jock picked on you. Think about it. Don’t you think you deserve a little justice?” Celeste bit her finger seductively before vanishing into fairy dust just as Samnatha began to stir. As she opened her eyes Brian saw for the first time since Celeste made his most recent change. Instead of only seeing through her crotch, he could now see through Samnatha’s eyes and as she looked down at her half nude self he felt himself getting wet.

“Oh hell yeah, this is going to be fun”, he thought.
11.title: Celeste makes a few changes

info.brief_description: Becoming the body part of someone else
info.description:
In this story, the main character of your choosing accidentally becomes the body part of someone else. This could be the body part of their significant other, a crush, or someone completely random.

As far as how it happens is up to you. It could be a genie (or other type being or object capable of granting wishes in a bad way), or a spell gone wrong. Can they move or speak on their own, or are they only conscious of their surroundings without the ability to express themselves? Which body part do they inhabit? The choice is yours of course.

The only rules are that the characters involved in sexual acts are eighteen or older and that all site rules are followed of course.

Have Fun!!!!
